title: Better Cake Eating
description: Allows you to eat cake in your hand multiple times by taking small bites.
body:
# Better Cake Eating
This datapack makes it so you can nibble on a cake while it's still in your hand! The bites taken out will be displayed as a durability bar, and the amount of bites will be preserved if you place the cake down.

![Showcasing that item bites are preserved when placing the cake as a block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5K8dHEZZ/images/8f69c5a6692384ea543239fdc8899d62bff8f31a.png)

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/better-cake-eating/)
